Metadata.title: Sebastian Kolbusz | Senior Frontend Specialist & Web Architect
Metadata.description: Senior Frontend Developer in Zakopane specializing in high-performance Next.js apps and refined digital experiences for global SaaS and local businesses.

hero.name: Sebastian Kolbusz
hero.tagline: Building high-performance digital products with a focus on visual polish and technical excellence.

bio.title: Sebastian Kolbusz
bio.description: Senior Frontend Specialist with over 6 years of experience building scalable SaaS products and professional digital appearances.

experience.label: Years of Experience
experience.details: Specializing in the React ecosystem, performance optimization, and refined UI/UX implementation.

location.details: Solving technical challenges from the heart of the Tatra Mountains.

philosophy.title: Technical Mindset
philosophy.details: I focus on simplicity, performance, and accessible architecture. I build systems where reliability and clean code are the foundation of brand trust.
philosophy.craft_details: I treat web development as a craft. It's about creating digital environments that are solid, responsive, and visually polished.
philosophy.quote: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication. Every line of code should earn its place.

seo.strategy_p1: My approach to web architecture is grounded in the belief that a professional digital appearance is built on a flawless technical foundation. By prioritizing performance, accessibility, and smooth interaction design, I help brands establish immediate authority.
seo.strategy_p2: Based in Zakopane, I bridge the gap between global standards and the personal touch required for local business success. Whether I'm building a complex React dashboard for a SaaS startup or a refined presence for a local service, my focus is on delivering results that stand the test of time.
seo.strategy_p3: I treat every project as a long-term investment in your brand's digital future. By utilizing modern technologies like Next.js and Tailwind CSS, I ensure that your website is not only visually stunning but also optimized for visibility and reliability.

projects.title: Selected Work
projects.intro: I focus on creating robust, accessible, and high-performance systems. From rapid prototyping to architecting enterprise-grade SaaS, I build digital experiences designed for long-term maintainability.

zakofy.description: Custom offer presentation platform for Tatra mountain tours. Elevated the client's digital presence through a refined UI and high-performance architecture.

your-krakow-travel.description: Unified offer presentation platform for a premier private tour provider. Centralized fragmented offerings into a cohesive and performant digital identity.

wellezza.description: Digital appearance for a local hair salon. Integrated third-party booking systems into a high-performance, custom-built storefront.

billboard-zakopane.description: Professional platform for a regional advertising leader. Streamlined the client journey with interactive location mapping and a modern technical base.

services.title: Services
services.intro: Focusing on technical excellence and professional digital appearances. I build websites and applications designed for performance, reliability, and brand trust.
services.limited_availability: * Accepting new projects for late Q1 2026

landing-page.label: Landing Page
landing-page.title: High-Performance Sales Page
landing-page.description: A focused, lightning-fast single-page website built with one clear goal: getting your visitors to take action. Whether you're launching a new product, gathering leads, or testing a business idea, this is the perfect starting point. I engineer every element to load instantly, rank naturally on Google, and guide users smoothly toward your offer without any confusing detours.
landing-page.ideal_for: Marketing campaigns, new product launches, and focused lead generation.

website.label: Business Site
website.title: Professional Web Platform
website.description: A comprehensive digital platform that acts as your hardest-working sales rep, working 24/7. I build tailored, multi-page websites that do more than just look good—they establish authority and educate your clients. From a compelling homepage that tells your story to an easy-to-use CMS that lets you manage your own content, this package gives you a robust, SEO-dominant structure built to perform.
website.ideal_for: Growing local businesses, agencies, and established consulting firms.

web-app.label: SaaS / App
web-app.title: Custom SaaS Development
web-app.description: Turn your complex business logic into an intuitive, scalable web application. Using modern frameworks like Next.js and robust cloud databases, I architect full-stack solutions tailored exactly to how you operate. Whether you need a secure internal dashboard, a seamless customer portal, or a complete Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) product, I deliver high-performance applications designed to grow right alongside your user base.
web-app.ideal_for: Tech startups, specialized internal tools, and data-heavy customer portals.

hourly.label: Consulting
hourly.title: Technical Support & Audits
hourly.description: Expert technical guidance to rescue, refactor, or level up your existing digital products. If your current website feels sluggish, is invisible on Google, fails accessibility checks, or simply needs a professional code review, I can step in. I help teams optimize their frontend architecture, smooth out clunky UI interactions, and establish solid engineering practices that actually work.
hourly.ideal_for: Projects needing urgent performance fixes, accessibility audits, or technical mentoring.

process.title: The Workflow
process.intro: A transparent development process focused on clarity and technical quality.

0.title: Discovery
0.desc: Understanding your technical goals and requirements.

1.title: Architecture
1.desc: Defining the tech stack and system flow.

services_page.meta_title: Web Development Services | Professional Websites & Apps
services_page.meta_description: Professional web development, high-performance landing pages, and custom business applications. Focused on speed, technical SEO, and Core Web Vitals.
services_page.h2_niche: Modern Websites and Apps for Your Business
services_page.trust_content: I build technical solutions focusing on performance, accessibility, and high conversion rates. As a senior engineer with experience in global projects, I deliver top-tier code quality, whether I'm building a complex application for a tech startup or a responsive platform for a local business. Every project is built on a modern technology stack (Next.js, React), ensuring lightning-fast load times, excellent Core Web Vitals scores, and a natural advantage in SEO.

0.question: How much does a website cost?
0.answer: Pricing depends on complexity. Landing pages start at €850, and full web applications from €3,900. I always provide a clear, upfront estimate before we begin.

1.question: How long does it take to build a website?
1.answer: A standard landing page takes 1-2 weeks, while a custom multi-page business site might take 3-5 weeks depending on revisions and content readiness.

2.question: Do you provide hosting and maintenance?
2.answer: Yes. I can set up optimized hosting (e.g., Vercel) and offer an hourly consulting rate for ongoing maintenance and support.

contact.title: Let's Build Together
contact.tagline: I'm currently accepting new projects. Reach out to discuss how we can build your next high-performance digital presence.
